top_findings.summary: The skill description includes requests to run external validation scripts (e.g., "Golden Nuggets 2026 checklist" from `design/product-spec/SKILL.md` and "any relevant checks or scripts") and access files in the user's home directory (e.g., `~/.codex/instructions/tooling.md` for quality gates). These actions are excessive and unrelated to the core purpose of generating a test plan from a PRD, as they involve executing arbitrary code and reading personal configuration files, which could pose security risks and are not essential for document generation.
